The investor achieved 100x returns in 2.5 years through a fundamentals-driven, medium-to-long term growth stock strategy with tactical band trading. Core approach: select industry leaders in high-growth sectors (currently AI and related fields like optical modules, semiconductors, and advanced packaging), prioritizing earnings momentum and valuation relative to peers within the same sub-sector. Position sizing is 80% core holdings in quality growth stocks plus 20% short-term tactical trades. Key disciplines include strict stop-losses, flexibly rotating between overvalued and undervalued holdings, and avoiding speculative 0-1 stage bets until sector leaders emerge.

title: How H-E-B became Texas' most beloved brand (2024)
content: H-E-B, a Texas grocery chain, earned strong customer loyalty through crisis preparedness. The retailer invested heavily in disaster response infrastructure after Hurricane Harvey, building microgrids, water wells, and mobile kitchens. It maintained operations when competitors failed, deployed emergency convoys before storms, and provided free supplies to communities. Its employee-owned structure and localized decision-making enabled rapid adaptation. This operational reliability, combined with community support during emergencies, transformed practical logistics into durable brand trust without traditional advertising campaigns.

title: If you can't hold it, you don't own it
content: The phrase "If you can't hold it, you don't own it" expresses skepticism toward digital and financialized assets, emphasizing that true ownership requires physical possession. The maxim suggests that paper investments, cryptocurrencies, or commodities held by third parties carry counterparty risk, whereas tangible assets eliminate reliance on intermediaries.

All saw increases exceeding 70,000 people. Five cities—Shenzhen, Dongguan, Guangzhou, Changsha, and Jinan—gained over 100,000 residents each. title: 我用 AI 的实践：把大任务给 AI，出错，再拆分小任务完成，并记录错误和任务过程
content: The author describes an AI workflow for complex coding tasks using a custom CLI environment that records errors, tasks, and project context in structured files. Initially, the AI fails frequently and requires detailed human feedback. Over time, accumulated records enable the AI to handle multi-repository migrations autonomously—such as completing a component migration in 20 minutes after a month of iterative learning. The system uses lightweight local RAG for record retrieval and supports team collaboration through Git-shared environment data.

title: 如何评价DeepSeek 发布 DSpark？哪些亮点值得关注？
content: DeepSeek and Peking University released DSpark, an open-source inference acceleration framework for large language models. It addresses bottlenecks in speculative decoding through a semi-autoregressive candidate generator and confidence-based verification scheduling. Deployed in DeepSeek-V4-Flash and V4-Pro preview services, DSpark improves per-user generation speed by 60–85% at equivalent throughput levels compared to the previous MTP-1 baseline. The framework and related models are available on GitHub under the DeepSpec project.

title: 从“打工仔”到“化工大王”，张国荣干出1400亿港元覆铜板龙头
content: Cheung Kwok-wing founded Kingboard Holdings in 1988, building it into the world's largest laminate producer with over 60 factories. After listing in Hong Kong in 1993, he expanded through capital operations, though property investments in bonds from developers like R&F Properties caused significant losses by 2023. Anticipating AI-driven demand, Cheung expanded high-end laminate production during an industry downturn. Kingboard now develops advanced copper foils for AI servers while expanding PCB capacity in Vietnam and Thailand. Despite revenue and profit growth in 2025, the company faces narrowing margins, rising competition, and increasing short-term debt pressure.

title: 梁文锋署名论文，DeepSeek首轮融资后大动作：生成速度大涨85%
content: DeepSeek has released open-source inference acceleration tools following its 50 billion yuan funding round. The release includes two optimized models—DeepSeek-V4-Pro-DSpark and DeepSeek-V4-Flash-DSpark—alongside the DSpark speculative decoding framework and DeepSpec training toolkit. Co-authored by DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng and Peking University researchers, the DSpark paper demonstrates 60-85% faster per-user generation speeds compared to production baselines, while maintaining throughput under strict latency constraints.

title: 刚刚，DeepSeek V4更新DSpark，推理速度提升80%
content: DeepSeek updated V4 with DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that accelerates LLM inference by 57%-85% without changing model outputs. It combines semi-autoregressive generation with confidence-scheduled verification to reduce latency in high-concurrency production environments. DeepSpec, the accompanying full-stack open-source toolkit for training draft models, was also released. The update focuses on engineering deployment rather than model capability improvements.

title: 大型“选妃”现场，米哈游终于不藏了
content: Genshin Impact released a new preview video "Sudden Snow" on June 26, surpassing 6 million views on Bilibili within hours and trending #1. The PV unveiled 9 new characters from the Snezhnaya region, including the long-awaited Tsaritsa (Cryo Archon), whose design draws from Russian historical motifs including Catherine the Great. Players had anticipated this reveal for six years, with some even using mathematical predictions to forecast the release date. The character designs incorporate Slavic folklore elements, such as the vodianitsa and vesna fairy prototypes. Overseas Russian players responded enthusiastically, praising the cultural authenticity. The PV also advanced key plot threads: the Tsaritsa's rebellion against the Heavenly Principles, the chessboard metaphor involving collected Gnosis, and connections to previous foreshadowing from 2022's "A Winter Night's Lazzo." title: 《经济学人》批美国：拿中国吓唬人很管用！ | 原文
content: The Economist criticizes the American political trend of treating China as a "useful bogeyman" to advance agendas. This tactic, while politically effective, undermines serious policy discussions. The article cites Senator Bernie Sanders, whose legitimate concerns about AI data center energy consumption were dismissed by framing them as helpful to China. The publication warns this exploitation of anti-China sentiment ultimately harms substantive policymaking and the politicians who engage in it.

title: 江西赣州被英伟达盯上，连夜搬走黑石头
content: Nvidia is securing high-performance neodymium-iron-boron (NdFeB) permanent magnets from a Ganzhou, Jiangxi factory for its robotics strategy. Ganzhou holds over 80% of China's medium-heavy rare earth resources, essential for producing these strongest-available magnets. The factory, founded in 2008 by two chemistry graduates, supplies electric vehicles and wind turbines, and began small-batch robot motor component deliveries in 2025. With global AI-driven demand surging, the company plans to expand annual NdFeB capacity to 60,000 tons by 2027—over one-third of projected global supply—making this obscure "black stone" a critical node in the AI robotics supply chain.

title: 我发现了微信 AI「小微」的 3 个 bug，也看到了 3 个巨大机会
content: The author tested WeChat's new AI agent "Xiaowei" and found three bugs: semantic misunderstanding when setting livestream reminders (interpreting "start" as "watch" and miscalculating time offsets), a one-day error in retrieving Moments posts from 24 hours ago, and incoherent context when switching from AI article recommendations to video suggestions. Despite these issues, Xiaowei offers three major opportunities: deep Mini Program ecosystem integration enabling voice-activated service access, "Mini Tools" allowing users to create personal apps through conversational AI, and AI penetration across WeChat's core features including payments, Moments, official accounts, and group chats.

title: 曾经倾力帮我的学长，如今再也不回消息。
content:

title: 段永平2025浙大演讲「十三条洞见」
content: Duan Yongping's 2025 Zhejiang University speech outlines thirteen insights centered on long-term fundamental thinking. Key principles include: prioritizing doing the right things over mere diligence; avoiding short-term profit traps; preventive planning over crisis management; surrounding oneself with people who see本质 (essential nature); and investing based on long-term value rather than information advantages. He emphasizes that business moats depend on user switching costs, cites Apple as superior to Coca-Cola, and stresses that quality of life and health matter more than longevity. His core philosophy: slow progress in the right direction outperforms frantic misdirected effort.

title: 单店月收40万，当地“查无此物”的韩国冰奶，正在国内疯狂开店

Ironically, the drink barely exists in Korea itself. The concept originated in Northeast China, repackaging common Korean café elements—fruit milkshakes, cupped shaved ice, and loaded iced milk—into an Instagram-friendly product. Light, refreshing, and affordable (15-25 yuan), it capitalizes on shifting consumer preferences away from heavy drinks. However, the category faces seasonal limitations, homogenization risks, and questions about whether it can build lasting customer loyalty beyond visual appeal.

title: Show HN: DBOSify – Drop-in Temporal replacement built on Postgres
content: DBOSify is a Python library that replaces Temporal's workflow engine with Postgres-backed durability. It allows developers to run workflows, activities, signals, and retries by simply substituting `dbosify` for `temporalio` imports and connecting to a Postgres database instead of a Temporal server. Workflows execute on a deterministic virtual event loop with all nondeterministic actions checkpointed in Postgres. Recovery replays recorded checkpoints to resume execution exactly once. It lacks gRPC wire compatibility, the Temporal Web UI, and CLI, offering DBOS alternatives instead.

title: GPT-5.6来了：旗舰版碾压 GPT-5.5，价格却没涨
content: OpenAI introduced the GPT-5.6 family with three tiers: Sol (flagship), Terra (balanced), and Luna (lightweight/cheap). Sol matches GPT-5.5 standard pricing while outperforming it; Terra costs half of GPT-5.5; Luna costs one-fifth. Sol features "max reasoning effort" and "ultra mode" with multi-agent collaboration for complex tasks. Benchmarks highlight strong performance in coding, biology (GeneBench), and cybersecurity (ExploitBench) with improved efficiency. The launch is currently limited to "trusted partners" via Codex and API at U.S. government request, marking increased government involvement in frontier AI releases due to national security concerns, though OpenAI opposes making such oversight permanent.

title: 大众汽车深化降本重组，裁员或达10万人
content: Volkswagen is intensifying cost-cutting and restructuring efforts, with potential layoffs reaching 100,000 employees. Job cuts may affect positions in North America and China, with four German plants also impacted. The company's stock price has fallen to its lowest level since 2010.

US tech stocks declined for a fifth straight day, with Micron and SanDisk falling ~7% and ~10%, sparking concerns about an AI inflection point. The pullback reflects momentum trade cooling rather than rejecting long-term AI logic. Rising memory costs are forcing Apple, Microsoft and others to raise prices, creating "AI inflation" and pressuring cloud providers' margins. However, AI compute remains inelastic demand—cutting purchases risks losing market share, and Agent frameworks increase memory needs. Software layers face optimization as enterprises impose usage controls and route tasks to cheaper models like DeepSeek. This "speed bump" reduces model provider revenue growth but doesn't collapse underlying infrastructure demand. The market is shifting from blind AI faith toward rational commercial reality.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 如何评价 OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6 系列模型？这次更新最值得关注的是什么？
content: OpenAI released the GPT-5.6 model series featuring three tiers: flagship Sol, balanced Terra, and faster, cheaper Luna. Unlike previous single-model releases, this update emphasizes stratification by capability, price, and use case. Access is initially limited to select trusted partners rather than all users. The most significant aspect may be the broader industry shift from generational competition toward deliberate segmentation across performance, cost, and access privileges.

Google developed a Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) architecture to speed up on-device AI on mobile devices. By retrofitting a lightweight MTP head onto frozen Gemini Nano v3 models and cross-attending to the main model's KV cache with zero-copy design, the system generates multiple candidate tokens in parallel for verification. This eliminates redundant memory usage (saving 130MB), reduces prefill latency, and achieves over 50% speedups on Pixel 9/10 devices compared to standalone drafters, while maintaining bit-for-bit output compatibility.

title: 睡得太多和睡得太少一样有害吗？
content: Research suggests excessive sleep may be as harmful as sleep deprivation. Both too much and too little sleep are linked to increased health risks, including cardiovascular problems and mortality. The optimal sleep duration varies by individual, but consistently sleeping significantly more or less than recommended can indicate underlying health issues. Maintaining a regular, moderate sleep schedule appears most beneficial for overall wellbeing.

title: GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source
content: GitHub and UNDP collaborated to assess Ghana's readiness for large-scale open source adoption through the OSPORA framework. Ghana's Ministry of Communications is undertaking comprehensive digital reforms, with strong political commitment and experienced champions, but faces challenges including lack of centralized open source policy, siloed ministries, under-resourced rural IT teams, and entrenched procurement patterns favoring proprietary vendors. The assessment found institutional inertia, not technical barriers, as the primary obstacle. Ghana's growing tech community and One Million Coders initiative provide foundation for digital sovereignty and economic growth through open source governance.
